css: .padding-section-small { padding: var(--spacing-container--spacer-2)0px; width: 100%; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; }

.padding-section { border-radius: var(--border-radius--1); background-color: var(--color--background); flex-flow: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%; height: 100%; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; display: flex; position: absolute; inset: 0%; }
.padding-section.is-cta { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 0px; display: flex; position: absolute; }
.col-50.is-sticky { justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; height: 100dvh; display: flex; position: sticky; top: 0px; }
.col-50.is-sticky-talent { justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 100dvh; margin-top: -25vh; display: flex; position: sticky; top: 0px; }

.card__item { column-gap: var(--common-used--size-2); row-gap: var(--common-used--size-2); border-radius: var(--border-radius--1); backdrop-filter: blur(30px); flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; width: 100%; height: 100%; padding: 4em 3.5em; display: flex; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.card-blurrer { z-index: -1; background-color: var(--color--background); opacity: 0.8; width: 100%; height: 100%; position: absolute; inset: 0%; }

.et__card { column-gap: var(--common-used--size-2); row-gap: var(--common-used--size-2); text-align: left; border-radius: 1em; flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; width: 100%; height: 100%; padding: 2em; display: flex; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.et__card.insights-card { background-color: var(--color--background); border-radius: 1.5em; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: flex-start; height: 26em; padding: 0.25em; overflow: visible; }
.et__card.is_sticky-card { background-color: var(--color--background); border-radius: 1.5em; width: 21vw; min-height: 20em; padding-right: 2em; }

.et__card.solutions { box-sizing: border-box; column-gap: var(--common-used--size-1); row-gap: var(--common-used--size-1); background-color: var(--color--background); border-radius: 1.5em; min-height: 18em; padding: 2.5em 0px; transition: background-color 0.15s; }

.large__card { background-color: var(--color--background-secondary); border-radius: 1.5em; grid-template-rows: auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; width: 100%; padding: 0.13em; display: flex; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }

.large__card:where(.w-variant-f11929ba-14ab-2b43-6b4f-f1a5c78ac440) { outline-color: var(--color--background-secondary); outline-offset: 0.06em; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); outline-width: 1px; outline-style: solid; }
.large-card-inner__visual_el { justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%; height: auto; padding: 0px; display: flex; position: relative; inset: 0%; }

.card__icon-wrap { z-index: 1; border-radius: var(--border-radius--0-5); justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 3.75em; height: 3.75em; padding: 1em; display: flex; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.card__icon-bg { background-color: var(--color--background); width: 100%; height: 100%; position: absolute; inset: 0%; }

.cards__wrapper { gap: 0.13em; background-color: var(--color--background-secondary); outline-color: var(--color--background-secondary); outline-offset: 0em; border-radius: 1.5em; outline-width: 0.13em; outline-style: solid; flex-flow: column; width: 100%; padding: 0px; display: flex; position: relative; }

.cards__wrapper.is--sticky-track { outline-color: var(--color--background-secondary); outline-offset: 0em; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0); outline-width: 2px; outline-style: none; flex-flow: row; flex: 0 0 auto; width: auto; padding-bottom: 2em; }
.cards__wrapper.is-items-holder { flex-flow: row; flex: 0 0 auto; width: auto; height: 80%; }
.card__visual-wrap { gap: 16px; grid-template-rows: auto auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; position: absolute; inset: 0%; }
.card__visual-wrap.is-dynamic { pointer-events: none; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-end; display: flex; }
.card__visual-wrap.is-solution { margin-top: 1.5em; margin-bottom: 0px; padding-top: 80%; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.qa_card { cursor: pointer; border-radius: 1.5em; flex-flow: row; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; padding: 0px; display: flex; position: relative; }
.qa_card_btn { cursor: pointer; border-radius: 1.5em; flex-flow: row; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; width: 100%; padding: 2em; display: flex; position: relative; }
.job__description__item.is-sticky-heding { z-index: 3; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); margin-bottom: -5em; padding-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; position: sticky; top: 0px; }
.client__card { flex: 0 0 auto; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; width: 11em; height: 7em; display: flex; position: relative; }
.job__sticky-title { z-index: 1; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; width: 100%; padding-top: 1.5em; padding-bottom: 1.5em; display: flex; position: relative; }
.job__sticky-bg { background-color: var(--swatch--n-300); opacity: 0; position: absolute; inset: 0%; }
.cards-holder-cms { gap: 2px; grid-template-rows: auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; width: 100%; display: grid; }
.sticky-card-overlay { z-index: 1; background-color: var(--color--background); opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; width: 100%; height: 100%; transition: opacity 0.3s; position: absolute; inset: 0%; }

.sticky__trigger { gap: 16px; border-radius: 10px; grid-template-rows: auto auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; width: 100%; height: 160vw; display: block; }
.cards__sticky-wapper { width: 100%; height: 100vh; display: flex; position: sticky; top: 0px; }
.sticky__wrap { justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; padding-bottom: 100vh; display: flex; position: relative; }
.sticky__holder { justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; display: flex; position: relative; }
.cards__inner { gap: 0.13em; flex-flow: row; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; position: absolute; inset: 0%; }
.case-studies-wrap .et__card .award__outter { transform: scale(1); transition: transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.485, 0.012, 0, 1.001), opacity 0.3s; }
